title: Epilogue
content:
Go, words of mine! and if you live
     Only for one brief, little day;
    If peace, or joy, or calm you give
     To any soul; or if you bring
    A something higher to some heart,
     I may come back again and sing
    Songs free from all the arts of Art.

                        -- Abram J. Ryan.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Abram Joseph Ryan, titled "Epilogue", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
